title: agrostis scabra var. oreophila
intro: Agrostis scabra var. oreophila, also known as mountain bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Agrostis scabra var. oreophila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of Agrostis scabra var. oreophila typically involve drying and infusing the plant material in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams for external use.
